meaning: n.观览物,展览物,公开展示,奇观,景象,光景,(a pair of ～s)眼镜
examples: It was a spectacle not to be missed.
The sunset was a stunning spectacle.
Hamburg's Abendblatt said it was a poor spectacle with Germany getting through - "but only just".
Even the most jaded traveller succumbs to the spectacle of Santorini's surreal landscape and dramatic sunsets.
